Who we are

About Tripledot Studios 🎮

Tripledot Studios was founded in 2017 by industry veterans from King, Peak Games, Facebook, and Product Madness — united by one goal: build a mobile games company driven by data and genuine product craft. We make casual, free-to-play games that are accessible to players of all levels, and we work on them obsessively.

We're a highly profitable, zero-debt business with 430+ people across six global offices. In 2025, we closed a transformative $800M acquisition of AppLovin's mobile gaming portfolio — making us one of the most significant forces in mobile games globally.

🏆 Recognition
🏆 FT Fastest Growing Business in Europe, 2022
🎮 Best Mobile Developer — PocketGamer, 2023
⚡ Tech Growth Business of the Year, 2021
👑 King's Award for Enterprise, 2024
📊
Data first, always
We think of ourselves as a data company that works in games. Every meaningful decision is grounded in evidence — with strong buy-in all the way up.
🎯
Player obsessed
We make games for everyone — accessible, endlessly playable, carefully crafted. If it doesn't work for the player, it doesn't ship.
🤝
Collaborative by nature
Close collaboration isn't a process — it's how we work. We build environments where talented people can do their best work together.
🚀
Built to grow
From 0 to 430+ people in 8 years, zero debt, strong profitability. We scale fast and with intention — and we're not done yet.
Why us

Why Tripledot Studios? 🌟

We're not your average games company. Here's what makes Tripledot a place where exceptional people do their best work.
🎮
50M+ monthly players
Our games are played by tens of millions of people every single month — real scale, real impact.
📊
Data-first culture
We think of ourselves as a data company that works in games. Every decision is grounded in evidence — with strong buy-in all the way up.
🚀
Built to grow
From 0 to 430+ people in 8 years, zero debt, strong profitability. We scale fast and with intention — and we're not done yet.
🌍
Truly global
430+ people across 6 offices, 35+ nationalities. London, Barcelona, Warsaw, Jakarta, Melbourne and Minsk.
🏢
12 studios, one team
A unique ecosystem of 12 studios — collaborate across genres and models without ever changing employers.
⚡
Top 5% for experimentation
Fast, accurate experimentation ranking us among the best in the industry. Your work reaches millions of players immediately.
Our story

Meet the founders 👥

Tripledot was founded in 2017 by industry veterans from Product Madness — one of the most successful mobile gaming companies in the world — with a shared mission to build a truly data-driven games company.
LS
Lior Shiff
Co-Founder & CEO
Co-founded and ran Product Madness before starting Tripledot in 2017. Passionate about building data-driven product cultures and scaling world-class teams.
LinkedIn →
EC
Eyal Chameides
Co-Founder & Chief Creative Officer
Accomplished game designer and creative leader, previously Creative Director of Product Madness. Leads the creative vision across all Tripledot studios.
LinkedIn →

The people

What to expect

Our interview process

We keep our process clear and purposeful — no surprises, no tricks. Here's the full picture and where you are right now and what the next steps will look like.

🤝 Our commitment to you
We give feedback at every stage and aim to move quickly. You'll hear from us within a few working days of each step — and if anything changes, we'll let you know proactively. No ghosting, ever.
Getting ready

How to prepare 🎯

Our interviews are a conversation — not a test. Come as you are, with a clear sense of what you're looking for and why this role caught your eye.

🔖 Know your story
Walk through your career clearly and concisely — what you've done, what you've learned, and why you're exploring a move. Focus on what's most relevant to this role.
🎮 Try our games
Download Woodoku, Solitaire, or Triple Tile from the App Store or Google Play. You don't need to be an expert — but genuine curiosity about the product always comes through.
🧭 Know what you want
We'll ask what you're looking for in your next role. Be honest — there are no right answers. The clearer you are about your goals, the better we can assess whether this is a genuine match.
💬 Bring your questions
Good questions signal how you think. Consider: what does success look like in year one? How does the team make decisions? What's the biggest challenge this hire will face in the first 90 days?
📌 Be specific about your impact
When sharing examples — what was the situation, what did you specifically do, and what was the outcome? The clearer your examples, the easier it is for us to advocate for you internally.

What to expect

Our interview process

We keep our process clear and purposeful — no surprises, no tricks. Here's the full picture and where you are right now and what the next steps will look like.

🤝 Our commitment to you
We give feedback at every stage and aim to move quickly. You'll hear from us within a few working days of each step — and if anything changes, we'll let you know proactively. No ghosting, ever.
Getting ready

How to prepare 🎯

Our interviews are a conversation — not a test. Come as you are, with a clear sense of what you're looking for and why this role caught your eye.

🔖 Know your story
Walk through your career clearly and concisely — what you've done, what you've learned, and why you're exploring a move. Focus on what's most relevant to this role.
🎮 Try our games
Download Woodoku, Solitaire, or Triple Tile from the App Store or Google Play. You don't need to be an expert — but genuine curiosity about the product always comes through.
🧭 Know what you want
We'll ask what you're looking for in your next role. Be honest — there are no right answers. The clearer you are about your goals, the better we can assess whether this is a genuine match.
💬 Bring your questions
Good questions signal how you think. Consider: what does success look like in year one? How does the team make decisions? What's the biggest challenge this hire will face in the first 90 days?

Common questions

FAQs 💬

How long is the talent screen? +
30 minutes. We'll keep to time and leave space for your questions at the end.
Do I need to prepare anything in advance? +
No — this is a conversational stage. No presentation or task required. Just come ready to talk through your background and what you're looking for.
Where is this role based? +
Fill in the location field on the left.
When will I hear back after the screen? +
We aim to follow up within 3 working days with feedback and next steps.
Can I ask about salary during the screen? +
Yes, absolutely. We're happy to discuss compensation expectations early so there are no surprises later in the process.
What's the culture actually like? +
We're a team of experienced people who take the work seriously but not themselves. Direct communication, genuine collaboration, and curiosity. With 35+ nationalities across six offices, strong ideas win regardless of where they come from.
Is Tripledot financially stable? +
Yes — we're a highly profitable business with zero debt and a strong balance sheet. We've grown consistently since 2017, and the 2025 AppLovin acquisition significantly expands the scale and ambition of the group.
I have accessibility needs — who should I contact? +
Please reach out to your recruiter directly before the interview and we'll make sure everything is set up for you.
Once again, we're glad you're here! Best of luck — we mean that! 🤞
Questions? Get in touch →
